{{Quote|We've been waiting almost two years for this. Corulag will forever be indebted to the Alliance.|Forridel to General Wedge Antilles|<ref name="Unifying" />}}
A '''battle''' at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] occurred in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. It was a major victory for the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] and provided the new government with control of a key [[hyperspace route]] to [[Yuuzhan Vong]]-occupied [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==History==
===Pre-battle===
Following a summit of [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force|military]] [[Commander/Legends|commanders]] at the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Contruum/Legends|Contruum]] in the wake of the [[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Defense of Mon Calamari]], [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] commanded the Alliance's [[Second Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Second Fleet]] in an attempt to liberate the key [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core World]] of [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] from the hands of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Unlike many other New Republic worlds in the [[Bormea sector/Legends|Bormea sector]], which fought against the Yuuzhan Vong, Corulag's leaders surrendered in hopes of avoiding the collateral damage that their neighbor worlds had suffered. Despite this, the majority of the world's ten billion citizens opposed the puppet government set up by the Yuuzhan Vong. Following the rescue of Alliance military figure and Corulag native [[Judder Page/Legends|Judder Page]], resistance groups on-planet contacted the Alliance for support in an upcoming rebellion against the Yuuzhan Vong occupation. Eager to aid a former New Republic world and secure a key world close to Coruscant, Alliance commanders [[Sien Sovv]] and [[Traest Kre'fey]] approved the assault.<ref name="Unifying" />

===Battle===
When the Second Fleet arrived in-[[Star system/Legends|system]], the situation on the ground had already begun. Resistance groups and citizens alike had turned on their conquerors and had begun revenge attacks on Yuuzhan Vong soldiers. Fighting raged across the surface of Corulag, while parts of the planet experienced [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]] from Yuuzhan Vong [[Warship/Legends|warships]]. The elite fighter units [[Blackmoon Squadron]] and [[Shocker Squadron]] attacked Corulag's primary [[Moon/Legends|moon]], escorting [[Scimitar assault bomber]]s in runs to destroy a Yuuzhan Vong base.<ref name="Unifying" />

In space, Alliance [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] traded fire with [[matalok]]s and other Yuuzhan Vong warships. Several of the mataloks succumbed to fire from the ''Elegos A'Kla'' and the ''Mon Mothma'', determined to protect the lone [[yammosk]] [[Carrier/Legends|carrier]]. When the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari cruiser]] ''Harbinger'' arrived and added its fire to the attack, the yammosk vessel was destroyed.<ref name="Unifying" />

As the battle drew to a close, a squadron of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] commandeered by the [[Peace Brigade]] entered the battle, and were hunted down by Alliance forces. As the Yuuzhan Vong fleet was being destroyed in detail, the resistance's appointed provisional governor of Corulag, [[Forridel]], announced complete victory over the Yuuzhan Vong occupation.<ref name="Unifying" />

===Aftermath===
Atrocities were reported across Corulag as frustrated citizens took out their rage on Yuuzhan Vong and collaborators. The former governor, a supporter of the Yuuzhan Vong, was hanged and pelted with [[Stone/Legends|stones]] in a square of the capital city of [[Curamelle/Legends|Curamelle]]. Despite this, the strategic world had been secured for the Galactic Alliance, who now had a key stop on the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]]. The victory celebration was short-lived, as the Second Fleet was immediately dispatched to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to aid in its [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar|liberation]].<ref name="Unifying" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}}
